title: koeleria subspicata
intro: Koeleria subspicata, also known as Koeler's grass or small hair grass, is a type of grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria subspicata include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and relieve stress. Koeleria subspicata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine practices.
